# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-artifacts:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2
    - name: Set up Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@v2
      with:
        python-version: '3.8'
    - name: Install dependencies
      run: |
        python -m pip install --upgrade pip
        pip install -r requirements.txt
    - name: Build artifacts
      run: |
        # Add your build commands here
        mkdir build
        echo "Building artifacts..."
        touch build/artifact.zip  # Example artifact creation

    - name: Upload artifacts
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
      with:
        name: build-artifacts
        path: build/

  deploy-job-1:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build-artifacts

    steps:
    - name: Download artifacts
      uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
      with:
        name: build-artifacts
    - name: Deploy to stage 1
      run: |
        # Add your deployment commands for stage 1 here
        echo "Deploying to stage 1..."

  deploy-job-2:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: deploy-job-1

    steps:
    - name: Download artifacts
      uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
      with:
        name: build-artifacts
    - name: Deploy to stage 2
      run: |
        # Add your deployment commands for stage 2 here
        echo "Deploying to stage 2..."
